paymentMethods.onchainTransferDescription: Send crypto from an SDP wallet to a counterparty's Solana address.
paymentMethods.payWithFiatDescription: Convert crypto to fiat and pay out through a provider.
paymentMethods.onchainDepositDescription: Receive crypto directly to an SDP wallet address.
paymentMethods.depositWithFiatDescription: Buy crypto with fiat through a provider and deposit it into a wallet.

cancelTransaction.title: Cancel this transaction?
cancelTransaction.description: This transaction has already been started. If you cancel now you'll leave the flow.

ramps.noProvidersAvailable: No providers are available for this selection.
ramps.walletReceiveDescription: Scan this QR code or copy the address to receive USDC or any SPL token on Solana into the selected wallet.

ramps.transferSignatureMissing: Transfer did not return a signature (status: {status}).
ramps.offrampManualDescription: Send {amount} {token} to the deposit address below before the quote expires. The provider converts it at the locked rate and pays out to the saved bank account automatically.

ramps.depositCompleteDescription: The funds have settled to the destination wallet.
ramps.payoutCompleteDescription: The payout has settled to the recipient's bank account.

status.waitingForFundingDescription: Send the funds using the instructions above. We will update this deposit automatically once the provider receives payment.
status.waitingToSendDescription: Complete the payout using the instructions above. We will update this outgoing transfer automatically once the provider receives your crypto.
status.depositReceivedDescription: The provider has received funds and is settling the deposit to the destination wallet.
status.sendingPayoutDescription: The provider received your crypto and is settling the outgoing payout to the recipient.
status.transferCompleteDescription: The deposit is complete. You can review the transfer from the counterparty record.
status.payoutSentDescription: The outgoing payout has settled. You can review this transfer from the counterparty record.
status.transferFailedDescription: The provider reported that this deposit failed. Review the counterparty record for the latest transfer status.
status.payoutFailedDescription: The provider reported that this outgoing payout failed. Review the counterparty record for the latest transfer status.
status.quoteExpiredFundingDescription: This quote expired before the transfer completed. Create a new quote to continue funding.
status.quoteExpiredPayoutDescription: This quote expired before the payout completed. Create a new quote to continue the withdrawal.
status.preparingDescription: We are waiting for the transfer record tied to this quote.

onchainSend.noAssets: This wallet has no assets available to send.
onchainSend.counterpartyNoAddress: {counterparty} has no Solana address on file yet.
onchainSend.attachDestination: Attach another destination address for this counterparty.

onchainSend.detailsTitle: What would you like to send?

bvnk.verificationRequiredDescription: BVNK partners with Sumsub to confirm your identity before activating your funding account. Hit “Complete Verification” to get started — this page refreshes automatically once you're approved, and your instructions will appear right here.
bvnk.verificationInReviewDescription: Sumsub is reviewing your details — this usually takes just a few minutes. Feel free to come back later; your instructions will show up here as soon as you're approved.
bvnk.verificationFailedDescription: BVNK couldn't verify your identity, so this funding account can't be activated. Contact support if you believe this is a mistake.
bvnk.fundingAccountProvisioningDescription: Almost there — we're provisioning your virtual account now. Your instructions will appear here in a moment.
bvnk.provisioningFailedTitle: We couldn't finish setting up your account
bvnk.provisioningFailedDescription: Something went wrong provisioning your funding account. Please try again.
bvnk.readyDescription: Your funding account is ready — fetching your details now.
bvnk.onrampProvisioningDetail: Provisioning a BVNK wallet and fiat→crypto payment rule for this quote.
bvnk.offrampProvisioningDetail: Provisioning a dedicated BVNK payout wallet for this currency.

lightspark.verificationRequiredDescription: We need to confirm your identity before activating your funding account. This page refreshes automatically once you're approved.
lightspark.verificationInReviewDescription: Your details are under review — this usually takes just a few minutes. Your instructions will show up here as soon as you're approved.
lightspark.verificationFailedDescription: We couldn't verify your identity, so this funding account can't be activated. Contact support if you believe this is a mistake.
lightspark.fundingAccountProvisioningDescription: Almost there — we're getting your funding account ready. Your instructions will appear here in a moment.
lightspark.provisioningFailedTitle: We couldn't finish setting up your account
lightspark.provisioningFailedDescription: Something went wrong getting your funding account ready. Please try again.
lightspark.readyDescription: Your account is ready — fetching your details now.
lightspark.onrampProvisioningDetail: Provisioning your Lightspark customer and deposit details for this quote.
lightspark.offrampProvisioningDetail: Provisioning a just-in-time Lightspark payout account for this withdrawal.

mural.termsDescription: Mural Pay requires the counterparty to accept hosted terms before identity verification can begin.
mural.verificationRequiredDescription: Mural Pay needs the counterparty to complete hosted verification before activating a funding account.
mural.verificationInReviewDescription: Mural Pay is reviewing the counterparty. Funding instructions will appear once verification is approved.
mural.verificationFailedDescription: Mural Pay couldn't approve this counterparty, so a funding account can't be activated.
mural.fundingAccountProvisioningDescription: Mural Pay is activating a funding account. Bank details will appear here when it is ready.
mural.readyDescription: Your Mural Pay funding account is ready. Fetching the latest details now.
mural.onrampProvisioningDetail: Provisioning a Mural Pay funding account for this counterparty.
mural.offrampProvisioningDetail: Checking Mural Pay organization verification before withdrawal.
